title: Skyblock All Advancements++
description: Vanilla Skyblock: Advancement Edition is a lightweight vanilla-style skyblock pack where you start with almost nothing on a tiny void island. Earn every advancement and go beyond with extra mod-added advancements.
body:
# Vanilla Skyblock: Advancement Edition

Welcome to **Vanilla Skyblock: Advancement Edition** — a **vanilla-first** skyblock modpack built around one clear objective:

✅ **Complete every advancement**  
…and complete even more thanks to **mod-added advancements** that expand the path to **100%**.

This pack is designed to feel **familiar and balanced**, focusing on **creativity** and **survival progression** rather than massive tech trees or complicated magic systems. You’ll start with **minimal resources** and grow your island into a **self-sustaining world** while pushing for full advancement completion.

## What to expect
- **Classic skyblock gameplay** with a vanilla vibe  
- **Advancement-focused progression** (completionist-friendly)  
- **Extra goals & challenges** added through mods  
- Built to be **straightforward, stable, and fun** for long-term play  

If you like turning tiny beginnings into huge builds — and you love checking off goals — this pack is for you.
